Spot is strongly magnetized to the massive 0DTE Call open interest at 648-650. The 640 strike acts as a triple-expiry harmonic resonance floor, providing robust structural support.

market_regime.interpretation: Call walls are solid resistance. Put walls are solid support. Gamma flip acts as a pivot point. Expect mean reversion.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Low and suppressed. Highly positive total GEX indicates dealers are heavily long gamma, leading to structural mean-reversion and tight range-bound trading.
outlook.summary: The market is in a strong positive GEX regime (42.93B total), indicating dealers are long gamma and will actively suppress volatility by selling into rallies and buying into dips. Spot is trading above the Monthly Gamma Flip (6998), confirming the bullish structural framework. The massive Put OI at 7000 across all expirations forms an impenetrable structural anchor. Expect upward pressure to be capped by heavy Call OI resistance between 7100 and 7200.

levels.motivazione: Massive Put OI in 0DTE (105k), combined with heavy Put OI in Weekly and Call OI in Monthly (85k). This strike aligns perfectly with the Monthly Gamma Flip (6998), creating a massive structural anchor where dealers will aggressively hedge.
Monthly Gamma Flip level. Spot is currently well above this level, confirming the positive GEX environment and structural bullish momentum. Losing this level shifts the regime to negative gamma.
Significant Call OI concentration across all three expirations (0DTE: 10.6k, Weekly: 4.3k, Monthly: 11.8k). Represents a primary ceiling where dealers will sell calls to cap upside momentum.
Immediate resistance just above the current spot. High Call OI in 0DTE (12.9k) and notable OI in Weekly. Marks the upper boundary of the current positive-GEX trading channel.
Heavy Call OI in Monthly (21k) paired with extremely high 0DTE volume (70k). Acts as a magnetic friction level that will slow down upward price action.

market_regime.interpretation: Call walls are solid resistance. Put walls are solid support. Gamma flip acts as a pivot point. Expect mean reversion.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Subdued volatility expected due to heavily positive total GEX, creating a stable pinning effect between structural levels.
outlook.summary: The market exhibits a bullish posture supported by a reverse volatility smirk and strongly positive cumulative GEX. Market makers are heavily long gamma, which will suppress large directional moves and actively pin the price. Focus is on the 26700-26900 range where intraday hedging flows are highly concentrated.

levels.motivazione: Confluence of significant Monthly Call OI (463) and massive 0DTE volume (919). Acts as the primary immediate upside barrier.
Psychological strike with huge 0DTE volume (816). Triggers aggressive intraday hedging and acts as a secondary resistance layer.
Exceptional 0DTE Call OI (252) and volume (889) below spot. Dealers long gamma will continuously buy dips and sell rips, creating a powerful price magnet.
Significant 0DTE Put OI (130) combined with notable Monthly Put OI (44). Provides a robust structural floor against deeper corrections.
Massive Monthly Call OI (1175) defines the ultimate structural ceiling for the current expiration cycle.
Major Monthly Call OI (533) and Weekly OI (71) establish a hard upside limit in the event of an extreme volatility expansion.
